title: CI Validation Pipeline — make check + GitHub Actions
definition_of_done: make check runs lint, test, coverage-check, and mutate in order; GitHub Actions workflow runs make check on every push and PR; AGENTS.md documents make check as pre-commit requirement
outcome: make check target added (lint→test→coverage-check→mutate), GitHub Actions workflow created (.github/workflows/ci.yml) triggering on push/PR, AGENTS.md updated with make check as pre-commit requirement

notes.msg: Explored project: Makefile has lint, test, coverage-check, mutate targets using golangci-lint and gremlins. No .github/workflows/ dir yet. AGENTS.md has Key Commands section to update. go.mod uses go 1.26.1.

Implemented all three DoD parts: (1) make check target in Makefile runs lint->test->coverage-check->mutate; (2) .github/workflows/ci.yml triggers on push and pull_request using actions/checkout@v6, setup-go@v6, go install for golangci-lint v2 and gremlins v0.6.0; (3) AGENTS.md updated with Pre-Commit Requirement section documenting make check

decisions.rationale: go.mod specifies go 1.26.1; using the same version in CI ensures consistency between local and CI environments
